refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle by optimizing load handling, travel efficiency, and dump operations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level. Decomposing it into sub-functions targeting each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows focused design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 under representative duty cycles and site conditions, verifying each sub-function's contribution to overall cycle time reduction.

candidate_dps: Optimized travel path planning and control
selected_dp.selected_dp: Automated load handling system; Optimized travel path planning and control; Efficient dump mechanism control

potential_sources: Interdependence between load and travel timing
Coordination between travel and dump operations
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by function but require coordination at the system level; modular design can manage coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate site and cycle telemetry data
Risk of timing delays due to network latency in teleoperation
Risk of suboptimal coordination if modules are poorly integrated
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit coordination DP or interface to manage timing dependencies between sub-functions.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level coordination and integration of load, travel, and dump operations

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Exchange of cycle time data and operational status between NGHE Solution and Vehicle/Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Commands from NGHE Solution to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules to execute load, travel, and dump tasks

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Safety alerts issued by NGHE Solution to Safety Services module during cycle operations

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communication backbone supporting data and command exchange among modules

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of cycle time optimization logic; low diffusion due to centralized coordination
Contains physical actuation and sensing; moderate diffusion due to embedded control
Supports remote control; higher diffusion due to distributed operator interfaces
Primarily safety monitoring and alerts; less containment of cycle time logic

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing cycle time optimization logic and coordination in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves ownership clarity.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Risk of delayed response if communication with Vehicle or Teleoperation modules is slow
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate splitting coordination logic if complexity grows; ensure robust communication interfaces.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR decomposition is clear and maps well to selected DPs with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk in Teleoperation module due to distributed control
Potential complexity concentration in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution for ownership; interfaces are well-defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and cycle time measurements across modules.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time optimization to NGHE Solution with supporting roles for Vehicle and Teleoperation.

recommended_revisions: Consider explicit coordination DP/interface for timing dependencies
Monitor complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
Plan for robust communication to mitigate latency risks

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and mapping to DP and IM is sound, with clear ownership and manageable risks. Verification approaches are feasible.

revise.why: To explicitly address coordination and timing dependencies between sub-functions in the next refinement level.

assumptions: Accurate telemetry and tasking data are available
Communication latency is within acceptable limits
open_risks: Potential complexity concentration in NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Cycle time measurements under representative duty cycles
Latency and reliability metrics of communication interfaces
